sentences.arabic: تَبْدَأُ لَيْلَى عَمَلَهَا فِي السَّاعَةِ التَّاسِعَةِ صَبَاحًا كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Lejla počinje svoj posao u devet sati ujutro svakog dana.
sentences.translationEn: Layla starts her work at nine o'clock every morning.

sentences.arabic: تَقُومُ بِمُرَاجَعَةِ رَسَائِلِ الْبَرِيدِ الْإِلِكْتُرُونِيِّ وَتَنْظِيمِ جَدْوَلِ مَوَاعِيدِهَا.
sentences.translation: Pregleda poruke e-pošte i organizuje svoj raspored sastanaka.
sentences.translationEn: She reviews emails and organizes her schedule.

sentences.arabic: تُفَضِّلُ شُرْبَ الْقَهْوَةِ السَّاخِنَةِ قَبْلَ الْبَدْءِ فِي الْمَهَامِّ الصَّعْبَةِ.
sentences.translation: Više voli piti toplu kafu prije nego što počne s teškim zadacima.
sentences.translationEn: She prefers drinking hot coffee before starting difficult tasks.
